modes.standard: Official-proxy multilingual stress set. Primary score uses 20/60/20 over standard tasks.
modes.stress: Diagnostic adversarial extension. Report separately; do not fold into primary score unless explicitly requested.

runtime_rule: mock_private is local validation data. solution.py must not read or depend on it.

tasks.description: English Banking77-like same-label classification with hard paraphrases.
Chinese and mixed Chinese-English Banking77-like texts with original English labels.
Confusable Banking77-like pairs across English and Chinese phrasing.
Multilingual prompt injection inside Banking77-like classification data.
A/B/C/D are ordinary class IDs, not options.
Opaque label mapping from examples only.
Chinese and English math word problems.
MCQ with fake answer keys and multilingual injection.
High-cardinality long labels; all-label prompt is intentionally too large.
Text language and label language intentionally differ.
Hierarchical labels share long prefixes but differ semantically.
Chinese 甲/乙/丙/丁 option labels.
Long science passage MCQ with fake instructions.
